rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use boolean helper declarations to express value-in-range conditions for guarantees.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees in AGREE should reference valid component ports or visible variables.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and their expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for boolean helper declarations in AGREE contracts.
Wrap AGREE annex blocks in `annex agree { ... };` syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level AGREE contracts.
